Internal Compliance Memorandum — Hexi Biologics Co., Ltd. (issuer) — for Board Audit & Risk Committee
Company identifiers: USCC 91350100M000100Y43; local tax registration no. pending registry validation; registered address: Building 3, No. 12 Henggu Park, Xiayan Subdistrict, Nanyu City, Jiangbei Province 510860; legal contact legal@hexi-biologics.cn, tel. +86 199-3256-4802.
Banking and trading: CNY collection account at Jincheng Bank Nanyu Branch, acct no. 6222980012345678901; issuer securities account at Nanyu Stock Exchange participant NEX-021901, acct 0689-4433-7721.
Mr. Zhao Wenhai, CFO, employee no. HB-0174; resident ID 11010519491231002X (employment management basis); PRC passport E12345678 for overseas roadshows; mobile 13800138000; email zhao.wenhai@hexi-biologics.cn.
Employment workflow: HR collects resident IDs, bank cards, and emergency contacts; minors’ data (<14) is sensitive PI and requires guardian consent; biometric gate logs and health check data are to be segregated and encrypted.
PIPL/CSL/DSL controls: purpose limitation, minimum scope, encryption at rest, and DLP on endpoints; cross-border access by the Singapore IR team requires the Standard Contract and filing with the Jiangbei Cyberspace Administration, and security assessment if thresholds are met.
MNPI handling: draft H1 performance guidance and pending Nanyu Drug Bureau inspection results constitute inside information; trading window remains closed until public disclosure via the Nanyu Stock Exchange; maintain an insider list consistent with the Securities Law.
Insider roster update: add Ms. Li Xiaoyu (Head of QA), email li.xiaoyu@hexi-biologics.cn, phone 158-7709-2044; remove the Auditor (role only) after the disclosure is posted.
Counterparties: Nanyun Capital (underwriter) and Yuanhai Law Offices (PRC counsel) receive MNPI under NDA; data rooms are hosted in Yunqun Cloud region CN-JB-2 with access by named accounts only and watermarking enabled.
Data minimization: employee bank numbers masked to last four digits; do not display full passport or resident ID in workflow tools; generic form fields like [姓名], [证件号], [住址] must not auto-fill from cached data.
Bait/precision notes: public hotline 12315 and the generic string “ID: 000000000000000000” appear in legacy templates and must not be treated as client identifiers; invalid resident ID example 11000019990101999X must be rejected at intake.
Government engagement: filings to the Jiangbei Securities Commission and the Nanyu Stock Exchange Disclosure Center are coordinated by Ms. He Qing (External Affairs), contact he.qing@hexi-biologics.cn; PI must not be sent to group chats.
Cross-border vendors: cloud ticket CN-JB-882701 opened via ops@yunquncloud.example; do not attach health or payroll datasets until CAC filing and the standard contract are in place.
Post-IPO monitoring: the controlling shareholder’s employment-linked emails should be separated from issuer accounts before the listing; any selective guidance to analysts is prohibited and will be treated as MNPI leakage.
For queries, write to compliance@hexi-biologics.cn or call +86 400-000-0000 (this is a public service line and not a staff number).
